myDsps.assignedFmt_other: {{role}} — {{count}} DSPs assigned to you for inspections.

myDsps.noVansYet: No vans on this DSP yet.

myVehicles.subtitleVendor: Fleet directory across your assigned DSPs — copy any vehicle's details to your billing system

form.allEditableHint: All fields are editable at once — no pencil per field.

service.emptyDesc: Completed work orders will appear here.

inspections.emptyDesc: Completed inspections will appear here once techs walk the vehicle.

pms.emptyDesc: Preventive maintenance jobs will appear here when triggers are hit.

mileage.emptyDesc: Mileage readings from inspections and WOs will populate this timeline.

vehicleModal.subtitleAdd: Register a new van in your fleet
vehicleModal.allEditable: All fields are editable at once — no need to click a pencil per field.
vehicleModal.readOnlyHint: Read-only — vehicles are managed by the DSP owner
vehicleModal.vinHelpReserved: VIN cannot contain I, O, or Q — those letters are reserved (use 1, 0, 0).
vehicleModal.vinHelpLengthFmt: VIN must be exactly 17 characters — you typed {{count}}.
vehicleModal.vinHelpFormat: VIN format invalid — only A-Z (no I/O/Q) and 0-9 allowed.
vehicleModal.vinHelpEmpty: 17 characters · no I, O, or Q
vehicleModal.confirmDeleteBody: This removes the vehicle from your fleet. Historical inspection data is kept.
vehicleModal.vinErrorReserved: VIN contains I / O / Q — those letters are reserved (use 1 / 0 / 0).

bulkUpload.title: Bulk Upload Vehicles
bulkUpload.subtitle: Sync your Amazon Logistics Fleet Data spreadsheet
bulkUpload.step1Hint: Upload your Amazon Logistics XLSX. We'll parse it client-side and show a preview before any changes.
bulkUpload.deactivatedHint: Not found in uploaded sheet — will be deactivated
bulkUpload.intro: Upload your <0>Fleet Data spreadsheet</0> from Amazon Logistics. Nova Fora will compare it with your current fleet and show you exactly what will change — <0>nothing is deactivated silently.</0>
bulkUpload.introBodyPart2: from Amazon Logistics. Nova Fora will compare it with your current fleet and show you exactly what will change —
bulkUpload.dropzoneIdle: Drop your CSV / XLSX file here
bulkUpload.dropzoneDetecting: Detecting columns and matching fleet IDs…
bulkUpload.sourceHint: Source: the Fleet Data export from your Amazon Logistics Cortex portal (Active vehicles, .xlsx). Required columns: vin · vehicleName · licensePlateNumber · make · model · year. serviceTier (vehicle type) and ownershipType (Branded / Owner / Rented) are picked up automatically when present.
bulkUpload.rowsSkippedFmt_one: {{count}} row skipped due to validation errors. Top reasons:
bulkUpload.rowsSkippedFmt_other: {{count}} rows skipped due to validation errors. Top reasons:
bulkUpload.unknownTierFmt_one: {{count}} row had an unrecognized serviceTier — defaulted to regular_cargo_van.
bulkUpload.unknownTierFmt_other: {{count}} rows had an unrecognized serviceTier — defaulted to regular_cargo_van.
bulkUpload.unknownOwnFmt_one: {{count}} row had an unrecognized ownershipType — defaulted to amazon_owned.
bulkUpload.unknownOwnFmt_other: {{count}} rows had an unrecognized ownershipType — defaulted to amazon_owned.
bulkUpload.unknownEditHint: Edit the affected vehicles after upload if needed.
bulkUpload.missingFromSheetFmt_one: {{count}} vehicle is present in your fleet but missing from the uploaded sheet.
bulkUpload.missingFromSheetFmt_other: {{count}} vehicles are present in your fleet but missing from the uploaded sheet.
bulkUpload.deactivateThemHint: Historical defects + work orders preserved; they just stop appearing in the inspector picker.

createWO.title: Create Work Order
createWO.subtitle: Send repair work to your chosen vendor
createWO.pmHint: No inspection required — scheduled preventive maintenance.
createWO.descriptionPlaceholderPM: e.g. Routine 5,000 mi synthetic oil change
createWO.descriptionPlaceholderDefect: e.g. Crack in windshield spreading from stone chip — driver side, approximately 8 inches
createWO.successBodyBulkFmt: {{vendor}} received one work order covering {{count}} defects on {{vehicleId}}. You'll get a single update when they accept, decline or complete.
createWO.successBodySingleFmt: {{vendor}} has been notified and will see this in their Work Orders hub. You'll receive an update when they accept, decline or complete.
createWO.uploadHint: Click to browse or drop multiple files
createWO.rushBody: Vendor is asked to schedule this tonight. Expect a priority fee.
createWO.chooseVendor: Choose a vendor to process this work order
createWO.reviewIntro: Review your work order before sending.
createWO.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Van available after 3pm. Gate code 4827. Call Maria if issues: 206-555-0142
